import React from 'react'; import { BarChart, Bar, PieChart, Pie, Cell, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; const AnalyticsDashboard = ({ analytics, loading, onRefresh }) => { if (loading) { return (
Loading analytics...
); } if (!analytics) { return (

📊 Analytics Dashboard

No analytics data available yet. Start by onboarding workers and processing claims.
); } const { stats, riskDistribution, claimsByType, workers, fraudAlerts } = analytics; // Prepare chart data const riskData = [ { name: 'Low Risk', value: riskDistribution.low, color: '#48bb78' }, { name: 'Medium Risk', value: riskDistribution.medium, color: '#ed8936' }, { name: 'High Risk', value: riskDistribution.high, color: '#f56565' } ]; const claimsData = [ { name: 'Weather Claims', value: claimsByType.weather, color: '#4299e1' }, { name: 'Other Claims', value: claimsByType.other, color: '#9f7aea' } ]; const fraudData = [ { name: 'Safe', value: workers.filter(w => w.fraudScore <= 30).length, color: '#48bb78' }, { name: 'Flagged', value: workers.filter(w => w.fraudScore > 30 && w.fraudScore <= 60).length, color: '#ed8936' }, { name: 'Fraud', value: workers.filter(w => w.fraudScore > 60).length, color: '#f56565' } ]; return (
{/* Stats Cards */}
{stats.activePolicies}
Active Weekly Policies
↑ 12% from last week
{stats.claimsTriggered}
Claims Triggered
↑ 8% from last week
{stats.fraudFlags}
Fraud Flags
↑ 3% from last week
₹{stats.totalPayoutVolume.toLocaleString()}
Estimated Payout Volume
↑ 15% from last week
{/* Charts Section */}
{/* Risk Distribution Chart */}

📊 Risk Score Distribution

`${name}: ${value} (${(percent * 100).toFixed(0)}%)`} outerRadius={80} fill="#8884d8" dataKey="value" > {riskData.map((entry, index) => ( ))}
{/* Claims by Type Chart */}

📈 Claims by Disruption Type

{claimsData.map((entry, index) => ( ))}
{/* Fraud Detection Analysis */}

🔍 Fraud Detection Analysis

`${name}: ${value} (${(percent * 100).toFixed(0)}%)`} outerRadius={80} fill="#8884d8" dataKey="value" > {fraudData.map((entry, index) => ( ))}

Fraud Detection Metrics

Safe Workers: {fraudData[0].value}
Flagged Workers: {fraudData[1].value}
Fraud Detected: {fraudData[2].value}
{/* Workers Table */}

👥 Workers Overview

{workers.map((worker) => ( ))}
Worker City Premium/Week Claim Status Fraud Score Risk Level
{worker.name} {worker.city} ₹{worker.premium} {worker.claimStatus === 'has_claims' ? 'Has Claims' : 'No Claims'} {worker.fraudScore} {worker.fraudScore <= 30 ? 'SAFE' : worker.fraudScore <= 60 ? 'FLAGGED' : 'FRAUD'}
{/* Fraud Alerts */} {fraudAlerts && fraudAlerts.length > 0 && (

🚨 Fraud Alerts

{fraudAlerts.map((alert) => (
{alert.type === 'coordinated_fraud' ? '🚨 Coordinated Fraud Detected' : '⚠️ Suspicious Activity'}
{alert.message}
Coordinates: {alert.coordinates?.lat}, {alert.coordinates?.lng} | Time: {new Date(alert.timestamp).toLocaleString()}
))}
)} {/* Refresh Button */}
); }; export default AnalyticsDashboard;
